_comment: Tests skipped because they timeout waiting for dev server features not yet implemented.
oidcc-prompt-login: Dev server has no session management; cannot force re-authentication for prompt=login
oidcc-prompt-none-not-logged-in: Dev server auto-approves all requests; no concept of unauthenticated user for prompt=none
oidcc-max-age-1: Dev server has no session tracking; cannot detect stale authentication for max_age=1
oidcc-max-age-10000: Dev server has no session tracking to supply auth_time for max_age enforcement
oidcc-response-type-missing: Authorization error redirect works but browser simulation times out on conformance callback processing
oidcc-ensure-registered-redirect-uri: Authorization error redirect works but browser simulation times out on conformance callback processing
